The Wedding Invitation

Together, At Last

With hearts full of gratitude and eyes shining with joy,
we, the families of Rahul and Chandni,
joyfully invite you to witness and bless the union
of two hearts that have found their forever in each other.

Your presence will not merely grace our celebration —
it will complete it. Come, let's make memories
that will echo through generations.
